programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: In Texas, everything's bigger, except the hiding spots, and K9 Enzo proves it, locking onto a suspect wedged beneath a house; on the graveyard shift, rookie K9 Deebo steps up and shows he's the real deal; in Florida, officers shut down traffic for a high-stakes helicopter landing, rushing K9 Huk to an emergency hospital; elsewhere, K9 Diesel plunges headfirst into dark waters in pursuit of a suspe

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Along with FBI and Department of Correction agents, K-9 Eddie tracks down a suspect with an active warrant. Meanwhile, K-9 Jax hits the ground running, searching for a suspect accused of stealing a pickup truck. programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The King's Head in Addlethorpe, where hospitality queen Helen Coy holds court. A funfair game of hook-a-duck takes the guests back to their childhoods.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the dog-friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, where B&B newbies Louise and Andy Macbeth get a grilling, and one of the guests goes green around the gills.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Avid souvenir collectors Kevin and Julie Shadbolt welcome their rivals to The Albaston in Torquay. Some of the guests are startled by their menagerie of memorabilia.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Hotel Piccadilly in Bournemouth, a dance holiday venue run by Terri and Stewart. But while the female guests give it a whirl, the boys appear to have two left feet..

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&Bers meet for one last time to find out how much they've been paid and settle some scores, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug's position as the office clown is threatened by a new colleague's impersonations.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug fakes a heart attack to cover up the fact that he's forgotten Carrie's friend's name.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: .. Bedding: Doug goes looking for his father at a model train convention but instead sees his mother with a very seductive Arthur Spooner.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to find new friends in an attempt to annoy Deacon and his wife. But it's not that simple..

programme.desc: A modelling agent tells Robert that he has a unique look and convinces him to pose for headshots with their in-house photographer.
